revision.comment: still so long that it can easily make the correct name line-wrap... strip it down to concisely make the essential point.
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incorrect name
  |name=From an incorrect name
  |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term
  |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}}
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incorrect name
  |name=From an incorrect name
  |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term
  |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}}
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incorrect name
  |name=From an incorrect name
  |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term
  |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}}
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incorrect name
  |name=From an incorrect name
  |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term
  |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}}
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from incorrect name
  |name=From an incorrect name
  |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term
  |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}}
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incorrect name |name=From an incorrect name |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}. ** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details. |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}} |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incorrect name |name=From an incorrect name |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}. ** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details. |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}} |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incorrect name |name=From an incorrect name |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}. ** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details. |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}} |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from incorrect name |name=From an incorrect name |from=an incorrect name, that serves readers as a good search term |info=The correct name is {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{Big|'''{{{1}}}'''}}|given by the target of the redirect}}. ** ''Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the target'' without the use of a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] that hides the correct details. |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from incorrect names}} |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
